name: Hungarian Brandy Beef Goulash
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef, first cut of the Round or stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the beef with salt, pepper, and paprika until coated.
2. Heat shortening in a large skillet or Dutch oven. Add meat; brown well over moderately hot heat.
3. Stir in onions; cook for 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Add 1/4 cup brandy; ignite when flames die out.
5. Return to heat. Stir in consomme. Cover tightly and simmer until meat is tender, about 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
6. Add marjoram and caraway; cook for 10 minutes.
7. Blend cornstarch with the remaining 1/4 cup brandy. Stir into stew.
8. Simmer, stirring until liquid clears and thickens.
Makes 5 to 6 servings.
